name: sigillo-app
description: Self-hostable secret sharing app — authenticates via sigillo provider

scripts.dev: pnpm db:migrate:local && tuistory launch -s sigillo-app-dev --attach 'vite dev'
scripts.db:migrate:prod: echo "D1 pre-migration timestamp: $(date +%s)" && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.db:migrate:preview: echo "D1 pre-migration timestamp: $(date +%s)" && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env preview
scripts.deployment: pnpm db:migrate:preview && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview vite build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deployment:preview: pnpm db:migrate:preview && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=preview vite build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deployment:prod: pnpm db:migrate:prod && vite build && wrangler deploy
